title: nolana humifusa subsp. humifusa
intro: Nolana humifusa subsp. humifusa, also known as 'humifusa nolana', is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae, native to the Andes mountains. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Nolana humifusa subsp. humifusa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and even exhibit antiviral activity. Herbal preparations of Nolana humifusa subsp. humifusa typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves or roots, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
